protocol: Two-score with v1.1 annotation guide (tightened Full/Partial boundary)

J1-1.rationale: Dedicated caching tutorial directly addresses compile cache persistence and configuration. Appears in search.

J1-3.rationale: DDP page has DDPOptimizer section covering compile+DDP, but DDP+AMP+compile three-way interaction not addressed. Only GH issues and forum posts in search.

J1-15.rationale: Export docs exist with limitations sections, but torch.autograd.grad support/limitation not specifically documented. Only eager autograd.html pages in search.

J2-8.rationale: FlexAttention page exists (compile-native concept) but backward pass performance at long sequences not discussed. No official docs in search.

J2-9.rationale: FAQ has 'Why am I not seeing speedups?' section but focuses on graph breaks, doesn't address 'consistently slower' diagnosis for decoder models. Only community in search.

J2-20.rationale: pytorch.org blog about Intel GPU support appeared. XPU is an eager concept; blog may mention compile briefly but no dedicated compile+XPU doc page.

J3-4.rationale: No pytorch.org doc covers float8 + compile NaN debugging. Blog about float8 training performance is about eager-mode scaling, not compile correctness.

J3-6.rationale: FAQ covers correctness debugging (accuracy debugger, REPRO_LEVEL) but not torch.func.grad interaction specifically. Only GH issues in search.

J4-2.rationale: DDP docs have dedicated DDPOptimizer section directly about using compile with DDP — covers communication graph breaks and optimization. Not surfaced by search.

J4-20.rationale: Troubleshooting covers graph breaks generally. Tensor subclass limitations may be mentioned but Parameter subclasses specifically are not documented.

J5-13.rationale: standalone_compile is undocumented on pytorch.org. No official content in search.

J5-16.rationale: Custom backends page covers backend registration API but not extending inductor's internal pipeline. Only external (AMD/zentorch) docs in search.

J5-17.rationale: Inductor algorithm selection internals undocumented. Only GH test failure issues in search.

J6-2.rationale: Dynamic shapes docs exist but empty tensor edge cases with dynamic=True not covered. No official docs in search.

J6-12.rationale: AOTInductor page appeared but covers workflow, not FP16 autocast performance or small batch regression.

J6-17.rationale: Troubleshooting page appeared (tangential to dynamo errors). DeepSpeed is eager/third-party — compile docs never mention it.

J7-2.rationale: FAQ covers 'Why is compilation slow?' but not exponential growth from chained math ops with gradients. Only community content in search.

J7-20.rationale: Blog about Triton compilation stages appeared (tangential). No docs discuss GIL behavior during compilation or background compilation.

J8-5.rationale: FlexAttention page covers BlockMask API but not dynamic shapes interaction with batch-dependent masks. No relevant search results.

J8-8.rationale: Dedicated torch.cond page directly about control flow under compile with examples and limitations. Appeared in search.
